resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to this stunning 3 BHK flat in Flora Iris, Ghuma, Ahmedabad. This beautifully designed home offers a perfect blend of modern aesthetics and comfortable living, situated in a serene and well-connected neighborhood.::::::Property Specifications::::::Located on the 4th floor of a 13-story building, this spacious 3 BHK flat  offers a perfect blend of comfort and convenience. The unfurnished bedrooms feature uniform vitrified flooring, creating a seamless aesthetic throughout the home. Existing furniture and furnishings are loose, with an option for buyers to purchase them at an additional lump sum if desired.::::::The drawing room opens onto a standing balcony with a picturesque view of the clubhouse garden, while the master bedroom includes a standing balcony overlooking the main road. The modular PVC kitchen is equipped with drawers, cabinets, a Nano White marble platform, and an SS sink, complete with a gas connection, though it lacks a chimney and hob.::::::This Vastu-compliant flat boasts a west-facing main door, ensuring positive energy flow. It features three bathrooms: one common and two attached to bedrooms. The common and one attached bathroom have western-style fittings, while the other attached bathroom is Indian style. A geyser is available for hot water, and the flat is equipped with all necessary lights and fans, backed by 100% power backup to ensure uninterrupted comfort.::::::Facilities and locality ::::::The community amenities are exceptional, including a clubhouse with a swimming pool, gym, games room, party room, event spaces, reading and working areas, and a kid's play area garden. Security is paramount, with 24/7 surveillance and CCTV coverage. The flat comes with two dedicated covered parking spaces.::::::The locality is ideal, with Apollo International School just 0.8 km away, SoBo Center 2.3 km, Club O7 2 km, VIP Road 1 km, and Ghuma BRTS 1 km. The area is well-connected with excellent public transport options, including BRTS routes and SP Ring Road, all within a 2 km radius, ensuring ease of commute and accessibility to essential services and entertainment hubs.::
